compiled_state.title: Write failing unit tests for figma-node-mapper.py (RED)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## What
Write tests/unit/scripts/test_figma_node_mapper.py with failing pytest unit tests specifying the observable behavior of figma-node-mapper.py before implementation.

## testing_mode: RED
New source file, no prior coverage.

## Test Approach (Given/When/Then)
- NM-1: Given Figma JSON with a FRAME node, when figma_node_mapper.map_nodes() is called, then output contains a component with type matching the hierarchy entry and spatial_hint from absoluteBoundingBox
- NM-2: Given a TEXT node with characters='Hello', when mapped, then output component has text='Hello'
- NM-3: Given a RECTANGLE node with fills=[{r,g,b,a}], when mapped, then output component has props.fills containing that fill
- NM-4: Given a COMPONENT node with componentId='abc', when mapped, then output component has componentId='abc' preserved
- NM-5: Given an INSTANCE node, when mapped, then output component type is Instance
- NM-6: Given a tree 30 levels deep and depth_limit=20, when map_nodes() traverses it, then traversal stops at depth 20 (no recursion past limit)
- NM-7: Given a Figma node whose name matches a component id in the original manifest, when identity_match() runs, then the Figma node is matched to that component id (not flagged as designer-added)
- NM-8: Given a Figma node with no name match but same structural position as an original component, when identity_match() runs, then it is matched by position fallback
- NM-9: Given a Figma node with no name match and no position match, when identity_match() runs, then it is flagged as designer-added (unmatched_new)
- NM-10: Given an original manifest component with no Figma counterpart, when identity_match() runs, then it is flagged as designer-removed (unmatched_original)
- NM-11: Given a valid mapping output, when validate_schema() runs, then it returns True (passes spatial-layout.json schema)

## Files to Create
- tests/unit/scripts/test_figma_node_mapper.py

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/unit/scripts/test_figma_node_mapper.py exists
  Verify: test -f tests/unit/scripts/test_figma_node_mapper.py
- [ ] Contains test cases NM-1 through NM-11
  Verify: for t in NM-1 NM-2 NM-3 NM-4 NM-5 NM-6 NM-7 NM-8 NM-9 NM-10 NM-11; do grep -q "$t" tests/unit/scripts/test_figma_node_mapper.py || exit 1; done
- [ ] pytest tests/unit/scripts/test_figma_node_mapper.py exits non-zero (RED — module does not exist yet)
  Verify: poetry run pytest tests/unit/scripts/test_figma_node_mapper.py; [ $? -ne 0 ]
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh exits 0 (RED tests reported but run-all not blocked)

comments.body: AC amendment: Verify pytest discovery covers tests/unit/scripts/ — check pyproject.toml testpaths. If tests/unit/scripts/ is not in testpaths, move test file to tests/unit/test_figma_node_mapper.py where existing pytest infrastructure applies. Acceptance criteria must confirm: poetry run pytest tests/unit/test_figma_node_mapper.py (or the confirmed path) exits non-zero in RED state.
comments.author: Test
